view_definition: select `app`.`orders`.`order_id` AS `order_id`,`app`.`orders`.`customer_name` AS `customer_name`,sum(`app`.`order_items`.`total_price`) AS `total` from (`app`.`orders` join `app`.`order_items` on((`app`.`orders`.`order_id` = `app`.`order_items`.`order_id`))) group by `app`.`orders`.`order_id`,`app`.`orders`.`customer_name`
